videos.title: Australian Olympic Team - 2019 in review
videos.description: We look back at the major moments of 2019 in Olympic sports.

videos.title: NKorean Taekwondo demonstrators returning home from Olympics
videos.description:
(15 Feb 2018) North Korean taekwondo demonstrators returned to the North on Thursday after more than a week of stay in South Korea.
A group of North Korea-led International Taekwondo Federation members took part in the Pyeongchang Winter Olympics' opening ceremony and held performances during their stay. 
They arrived in South Korea on February 7.
